title: OAuth 2.0 Authorization Posture Mechanism (APM) — draft-vicente-oauth-apm
description: Source repository for the IETF Internet-Draft draft-vicente-oauth-apm. Defines the OAuth 2.0 Authorization Posture Mechanism (APM), a framework for conveying cryptographic posture metadata within OAuth 2.0 authorization flows. IETF Independent Submission. Patent-pending: USPTO 64/080,137 (2026-06-01), 19/698,870 (2026-06-05). PEN: 1.3.6.1.4.1.65953.
notes: Patent-pending: U.S. Provisional Patent Application No. 64/080,137 (filed 2026-06-01) and U.S. Patent Application No. 19/698,870 (filed 2026-06-05). This record does not grant any patent license. Sanctum SecOps Private Enterprise Number (PEN): 1.3.6.1.4.1.65953.
